report.summary: Built 2 learn guides: Congressional Tokenization Hearing (today's historic House Financial Services Committee hearing on the Modernizing Markets Through Tokenization Act and Capital Markets Technology Modernization Act, $26.5B RWA market context) and BitGo IPO (first crypto custody firm IPO of 2026, $212.8M raised at $2.08B valuation, first earnings report tomorrow). Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: House Financial Services Committee holds hearing 'Tokenization and the Future of Securities: Modernizing Our Capital Markets' on March 25, 2026 — the most significant congressional tokenization hearing to date

Two bills under discussion: Modernizing Markets Through Tokenization Act (SEC/CFTC joint study on tokenized securities rules) and Capital Markets Technology Modernization Act (blockchain record-keeping for broker-dealers)

Tokenized RWA market at $26.48B distributed on-chain value (up 5.25% in 30 days), represented asset value at $387.35B; major players include BlackRock BUIDL ($2B+), Franklin Templeton BENJI, Ondo, Securitize
Nasdaq filed a proposed rule change in January 2026 to enable trading of tokenized securities on its exchange; SEC confirmed 2026 rollout of Innovation Exemption
BitGo completed first crypto IPO of 2026 on January 22, 2026 — raised $212.8M at $18/share ($2.08B valuation), ticker BTGO on NYSE
BitGo FY2024 revenue: $308M, net profit: $15.66M; Q4 and full year 2025 earnings report due March 26, 2026
Screened 10+ potential topics (CLARITY Act update, staking ETFs, ERC-8004, Casper hard fork, AI agent wallets, Morgan Stanley ETF) — all already covered in existing 800+ published pages
Sources: FinTech Weekly, CryptoNews, PYMNTS, CoinDesk, Yahoo Finance, Bitcoin Magazine, The Street, Congress.gov, SEC.gov

sections.title: Content Created
items: Congressional Tokenization Hearing guide (~3,000 words): 7 sections covering why the hearing matters, both bills' provisions, 5 key witnesses and their roles, $26.5B RWA market context with platform comparison table, Nasdaq filing and SEC Innovation Exemption, CLARITY Act connection and regulatory timeline, 6 risk categories, 5 FAQs

BitGo IPO guide (~3,000 words): 7 sections covering what BitGo does (custody/infrastructure), full IPO details and metrics table, financial performance and upcoming earnings, crypto custody competitive landscape comparison table (BitGo vs Coinbase Custody vs Fireblocks vs Anchorage), institutional momentum timeline, 5 signals for crypto markets, 6 risk categories, 5 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Congressional Tokenization Hearing: title 'Congressional Tokenization Hearing Guide 2026: How Two Bills Could Reshape Securities Markets', target keywords 'congressional tokenization hearing 2026, Modernizing Markets Through Tokenization Act, tokenized securities regulation', Article + FAQ schemas (5 FAQs), internal links to /learn/clarity-act-crypto-guide, /learn/tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026, /learn/tokenized-funds-institutional-defi-guide, /learn/sec-digital-commodities-classification-guide, /learn/tokenized-stocks-guide-2026

BitGo IPO: title 'BitGo IPO Guide 2026: What the First Crypto Custody IPO Means for Institutional Adoption', target keywords 'BitGo IPO 2026, crypto custody IPO, BTGO stock', Article + FAQ schemas (5 FAQs), internal links to /learn/morgan-stanley-bitcoin-etf-msbt-guide, /learn/bitcoin-etf-guide-2026, /learn/crypto-etfs-complete-guide, /learn/staked-crypto-etfs-guide-2026, /tools/portfolio-tracker
Both pages: OpenGraph article type, Breadcrumb navigation, StructuredData component with combined Article + FAQ schemas, published dates set to 2026-03-25

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: No new interactive components required — both are educational learn guides using existing Breadcrumb and StructuredData components with static content, comparison tables, timelines, and info boxes

sections.title: Publishing
items: Both slugs added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
TypeScript check passed — no errors in new page files
